nasb.text: For You have heard my vows, O God; You have given me the inheritance of those who fear Your name.

esv.text: For you, O God, have heard my vows; you have given me the heritage of those who fear your name.

cnv.text: 神啊！你聽了我所許的願； 你把產業賜給敬畏你名的人。

ccb.text: 上帝啊，你已经听见我的誓言， 把你赐给敬畏你名之人的产业赐给我。

csbs.text: 是的，神哪，是你垂听了我所许的愿， 将产业赐给敬畏你名的人！
